title: lora_l2.c:264 hash_input buffer may have uninitialized padding
description: Contract consideration: generate_eui64() - hash_input buffer at line 267 is declared but not initialized. memcpy at lines 312-313 fills prefix + hwid bytes, but if hwid_len < sizeof(hwid), remaining bytes of hash_input after hwid are uninitialized. lichen_sha256 at line 314 uses EUI64_DOMAIN_PREFIX_LEN + hwid_len which is correct length. No uninitialized bytes are read. This is correct - no bug.
close_reason: Not a bug: lichen_sha256 is called with exact length (prefix_len + hwid_len), so uninitialized trailing bytes in hash_input are never read.
